response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer with an impressive open-source track record and deep Linux-adjacent experience, but he is a poor match for this specific role. The position is an executive-level leadership job requiring client advisory work in German (minimum C1), and his resume lists German as basic — a hard disqualifier for a consulting-facing Head of Development in this market. He also shows no formal team leadership, people management, or technical project management experience; his career is consistently senior/staff individual-contributor work. Python and UML, both explicitly desired, are absent from his skill set.
strengths: Extensive, versatile engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems (15+ years)
Genuine open-source depth: maintains D-language libraries, founded the GISCollective geo-data platform, FOSS4G speaker
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and code katas
concerns: German listed as basic; the role requires minimum C1 for client-facing consulting work
No formal team leadership, people management, or executive experience — career is IC-track throughout
Missing desired skills: no Python, no UML, no evidence of requirements management or security/compliance work

key_factors.factor: German language gap (basic vs required C1)
No leadership or project management track record
Strong open-source and Linux ecosystem credentials
